info.title: Sysinfocus Automation
info.description: A .NET Minimal API and Blazor WebAssembly Standalone projects scaffolder.

x-inspectra.cliParsedTitle: Welcome to Sysinfocus Automation Tools - Version:
x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
A comprehensive scaffolder for .NET Minimal API and Blazor WebAssembly Standalone
projects with incremental feature addition using DTOs from the shared project.
GitHub repo: https://github.com/sysinfocus/sa-generated-solution

commands.name: add
commands.description:
Creates new feature with <name> using <dto> from shared project DTO folder
for eg: <name> = Employees, <dto> = EmployeeDto (this file should exists)

commands.name: migrate
commands.description:
Creates new migration with <name> in the data project folder
for eg: <name> = Initial, Note: avoid spaces in between

commands.name: new
commands.description:
Creates new solution in the current directory with <name> as namespace
for eg: <name> = Demo, <database> is optional and by default uses Sqlite
or enter one among [SqlServer / MySql / Oracle / PostgreSQL / MongoDB]

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run API and UI projects from console

commands.name: update
commands.description: Updates database with existing migrations in the data project folder
